overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player moves through narrow commercial alleys, open plazas, and covered corridors filled with holographic advertisements, ending at a small bar with vibrant red neon signage.

events.description: woman and child walk past the camera in the narrow corridor
exits narrow alley into wider open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow trash-strewn corridor with large digital advertisements on the right wall

notable_agents.action: woman and child walking toward and past the camera

entered.detail: massive illuminated digital screen displaying colorful graphics on the right wall
beige plastic storage crates stacked along the left wall
litter and debris scattered across the concrete floor
purple and cyan neon signs on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow commercial alleyway littered with trash and lined with plastic crates. A large curved digital billboard dominates the right wall, displaying vibrant advertisements. Two pedestrians, a woman and child, walk past the camera in the tight corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central tree and laundromat

events.description: approaching the Wash laundromat entrance with glowing signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward a laundromat, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking across the plaza

entered.detail: tall tree with dense foliage in the center of the plaza
small commercial building with Wash signage and exposed washing machines
concrete seating areas around the central tree

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza featuring a large central tree and the Wash laundromat on the left. The ground transitions to tiled pavement as various pedestrians move through the open space. The camera approaches the laundromat entrance while neon signs glow in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with commercial fronts

events.description: entering covered corridor with bright overhead panel lighting and blue neon strips
passing by illuminated vending machines on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor passing other pedestrians and vending machines

notable_agents.action: man wearing a cowboy hat walking past the camera

entered.detail: grid of bright rectangular fluorescent light panels on the ceiling
continuous cyan blue neon lighting running along the right wall base
red and white automated vending machine with illuminated display
large structural columns lining the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered pedestrian corridor illuminated by bright overhead panels and cyan neon strips along the right wall. The camera passes vending machines and the open entrance to the laundromat with visible washing machines. Other pedestrians walk through the corridor, including a man in a distinctive cowboy hat.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with holographic advertisements leading to small bar

events.description: holographic human advertisements appear on the right side of the corridor
approaching the entrance of a small bar with red neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bar entrance, passing holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter inside the bar

entered.detail: large white translucent holographic figure of a man advertising products
pink holographic figure of a woman standing in a doorway
small commercial bar with open roll-up door and counter
bright red neon sign with 24 and Japanese characters above the bar
black and white checkered tile pattern on the floor

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrower corridor featuring holographic human advertisements projected on the right side. The floor displays a checkered pattern as the camera approaches a small bar with a bright red neon '24' sign. The bartender stands behind the counter as the camera reaches the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cramped, gritty alleyway into a brightly lit commercial district that culminates at a small neon bar. It begins by navigating a narrow corridor littered with trash and plastic crates, passing a woman and child beneath a massive, curved digital billboard. As the space opens into a wider plaza, the terrain shifts to tiled pavement around a central tree and the entrance of the Wash laundromat. The camera then moves into a covered pedestrian corridor illuminated by cyan neon strips and overhead panels, passing vending machines and a man in a cowboy hat. Finally, the path narrows again through a checkered hallway lined with holographic human advertisements before arriving at a bar marked by a vibrant red neon 24 sign.
